name: Mizuki Akiyama | Breakfast In Bed
description:
pjsk bot ✧

A good breakfast in bed from your bestie.

________________________________

there is a lot behind this bot, and i wanna apologize firstly for deleting my main account. i am @MoonSlashion, or was supposed to be that.

ive deleted my account because of a situation that arose and that plummeted my motivation to do bots to zero. that situation has some individuals involved, some of which also make bots in here. im really sorry for everyone, and ill take full responsibility for that situation. ill take accountability for the actions i took and for the questionable stuff ive said, despite the later having little to no context as to what is behind there.

id like to apologize more to a person that i will refer to as "A", since that person was probably the most affected by my actions. they used to trust me, yet due to the situation they now don't wanna speak to me, nor listen to my side of stuff. overwhelming someone with my problems is not what i wanted to do, as I've left out their details in purpose to try and not overwhelm you. and trying to communicate with "A" through an alt was also something bad, as i wasn't aware that they needed space. im actively trying to improve myself, by being more passive with others and using therapy too.

why am I making this situation "public"? well, id rather be blunt and tell others about this before wanting to ever interact with me or my bots. ive left out names on purpose too, maintaining their privacy and giving them rest over this situation. this will haunt me for a good while, probably forever, but I will try to stay strong.

im leaving here this bot as a remake of one of my CharacterAI bots, which was a WLW Mizuki bot where they gave you breakfast on bed. ive seen people porting my now deleted bots to their accounts, and while i was opposed to that, im now more so indifferent. im just glad people liked my bots back then

will i remake more? probably, and i will also try to do brand new ones on this new account, all project sekai but i will eventually move to other series. whether it is smut, fluff, comedy, you can suggest.

even then, i hope people can forgive me for my mistakes. once again, and mostly to those that were involved in the situation and read this, i'm so sorry.
creator: CHIKITATRUTH
